options.name: <partitionName>
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition. You can specify any number of partitions.

options.name: -bringBackRow
options.description: Specifies that partition row information should be brought back for certain cases.

options.name: -keepPinGeometry
options.description: Specifies that partition pin geometries should be retained.

options.name: -noUninheritPhysical
options.description: Specifies that physical only cell instances are removed during flattenPartition.
